name: TRIMAS CORP
business: TriMas, through its continuing operations, designs and manufactures specialty packaging products (closures, dispensers) and steel cylinders for compressed gases. Its Packaging segment serves consumer packaging, life sciences, and industrial markets, while the Specialty Products segment supplies high-pressure steel cylinders for industrial, healthcare, and defense applications.
sellsTo: consumer packaging (beauty, personal care, food, beverage, home care)

exposures.sentence: Our product offerings include dispensing systems, such as foaming pumps, lotion, hand soap and sanitizer pumps, beverage dispensers, perfume sprayers and trigger sprayers, along with polymeric and steel caps and closures, including food lids, flip top closures, child resistant caps, drum and pail closures, and flexible spouts.

In addition, we produce airless dispensers for pharmaceutical applications, polymerase chain reaction (PCR) test kits for blood testing uses, components for vascular delivery and blood testing, and child resistant closures and containers as part of our expanding presence in the life sciences end markets.

In addition, we produce airless dispensers for pharmaceutical applications, polymerase chain reaction (PCR) test kits for blood testing uses, components for vascular delivery and blood testing, and child resistant closures and containers as part of our expanding presence in the life sciences end markets.

Norris Cylinder's large, high-pressure seamless cylinders are used primarily for shipping, storing and dispensing oxygen, nitrogen, argon, helium and other compressed gases serving industrial, health care and defense end markets.

catalysts.event: Sale of TriMas Aerospace expected to close
catalysts.sentence: The sale of TriMas Aerospace is expected to close in the first quarter of 2026, subject to the satisfaction or waiver of customary and other closing conditions.
